## Documentation Issue

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue.

- [ ] README.md

- [ ] DEVELOPMENT.md

- [ ] Other (please specify): __________

- [ ] Spelling/Grammar error
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Other: __________

## Suggested Change

Please describe the change you're proposing (or paste the corrected text).

## Current Location

File: `path/to/file.md`
Section/Line: (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the documentation issue.
